title: End-to-end user journey through feedback submission, general app settings (licenses and privacy policy), and notifications configuration
scenario: End-to-end user journey through Poly Studio Mobile app covering feedback submission, general settings, and notifications configuration from the "No devices connected" page without any device paired
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Observe the Home screen displaying the 'No devices connected' page.
3. Tap the hamburger menu (three horizontal lines) icon in the top-left corner to open the main navigation menu.
4. Tap 'Send Feedback' from the main menu.
5. Observe the feedback submission screen that appears.
6. Navigate back to the Home screen (No devices connected page).
7. Tap the hamburger menu icon again to open the main navigation menu.
8. Tap 'Settings' from the main menu.
9. In the Settings screen, tap 'Licenses' to view open-source licenses.
10. Navigate back to the Settings screen.
11. Tap 'Privacy Policy' to view the privacy policy.
12. Navigate back to the Settings screen.
13. Tap 'Notifications' to open the Notifications configuration screen.
14. Observe the list of notification toggles: Notifications, Device Charging, Device Disconnected, Low Battery, Device Software Update.
15. Toggle 'Notifications' ON and OFF.
16. Toggle 'Device Charging' ON and OFF.
17. Toggle 'Device Disconnected' ON and OFF.
18. Toggle 'Low Battery' ON and OFF.
19. Toggle 'Device Software Update' ON and OFF.
20. Navigate back to the Home screen (No devices connected page).
expected: The user can successfully navigate through all sections: Feedback submission opens correctly, Licenses and Privacy Policy display their respective content, and all notification toggles (Notifications, Device Charging, Device Disconnected, Low Battery, Device Software Update) can be switched ON and OFF without errors, even when no device is connected.
